'''''Mon Karren''''' was an [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80]] [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] in the [[Solo Fleet]], the less heavily-armored sister [[Starship/Legends|ship]] to the ''[[Mon Remonda]]''. During the hunt for [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] she was assigned to Group One of Solo's Fleet. She carried three squadrons of starfighters—two [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] squadrons and the [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] group [[Corsair Squadron]].<ref name="SC">''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]''</ref>

{{Ship-stub}}
